creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At <https://www.freebsd.org/administration/#t-portmgr> I thought, the phrase 'Port Management Team' (singular) looked slightly peculiar so close to 'Ports Management Team' (plural). 


On one hand, re: <https://www.freebsd.org/portmgr/> the Charter <https://www.freebsd.org/portmgr/charter/> is approved by the Core Team, so we might assume that plural is correct: 

Ports Management Team


On the other hand, this command finds many matches for singular: 

grep -r -i "Port Management Team" /usr/doc/website/
